25:04 â February 6, 2025
Update to the Currency Ordering Part
We added a new chapter to the Currency Ordering and Precious Metals Part to provide information on precious metals offerings. Class A financial institutions in BC and ON can now purchase or sell back select precious metals, allowing customers the opportunity to diversify their investments. This new chapter includes information on policies related to precious metals, purchases, sell-back sales, verifying shipments, packaging shipments, and settlement.
Currency Volume
Currency Ordering and Precious Metals Part
Renamed Part to Currency Ordering and Precious Metals Part.
Chapter 14, Precious Metals
New chapter.
